positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a lone crescent moon cradling a cluster of abstract, bioluminescent stylized flora. The flora should feature exaggerated organic shapes and glowing neon-like accents (teal, soft violet, and deep indigo). The composition should be centrally balanced, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong contrast against a deep midnight blue or black background. Style should be retro-futuristic, incorporating elements of Art Nouveau and modern graphic design. Flat vector style, high contrast, clean linework, pop art feel. Suitable for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blurry, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, logo, watermark, jpeg artifacts, noisy, low contrast, realistic photo, sketch, cartoonish, copyrighted, signature, messy
